name: ScoutCam Inc.
summary: ScoutCam Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells miniaturized imaging equipment in Israel, the United States, the United Kingdom, and internationally. The company offers micro cameras and supplementary technologies, such as micro complementary metal-oxide semiconductor (CMOS) and charge-coupled device (CCD) video cameras for medical device, aerospace, automotive, industrial, research, and defense industries. ScoutCam Inc. was founded in 2019 and is headquartered in Omer, Israel.
